banner.svg_html: <svg viewBox="0 0 1200 360" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="Saturday Questions Date and Time Calculations"><defs><linearGradient id="ppGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff9f1c"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ff7b00"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="1200" height="360" fill="url(#ppGrad)"/><circle cx="1060" cy="80" r="140" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)"/><circle cx="1120" cy="300" r="200" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"/><text x="60" y="138" font-size="58" font-weight="900" fill="white">Saturday Questions ❓</text><text x="60" y="196" font-size="34" font-weight="700" fill="white">Date and Time Calculations</text><text x="60" y="246" font-size="22" font-weight="600" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.92)">Parsing, rollovers, leap years, intervals, and real-world logic</text><g transform="translate(60,286)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="90" height="50" rx="12" fill="white"/><text x="45" y="33" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="900" fill="#ff7b00">PP</text><text x="110" y="33" font-size="22" font-weight="800" fill="white">Programmer's Picnic</text></g><g font-size="22" font-weight="900" fill="white"><rect x="828" y="112" width="128" height="64" rx="12" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.22)"/><text x="892" y="153" text-anchor="middle">23:50</text><rect x="974" y="112" width="76" height="64" rx="12" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.16)"/><text x="1012" y="153" text-anchor="middle">+25</text><rect x="1068" y="112" width="112" height="64" rx
